compiled_state.title: Update evaluator agent with blast-radius dimension
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Modify `plugins/dso/agents/complexity-evaluator.md`:
1. Add "Dimension 6: Blast Radius" section to the Five-Dimension Rubric
2. Add "Step 2.5: Compute Blast Radius" between "Step 2: Find Files" and "Step 3: Apply Rubric" — pipes discovered file list to blast-radius-score.py
3. Graceful degradation: "If blast-radius-score.py is absent or exits non-zero, skip Step 2.5 and continue to Step 3 without forcing COMPLEX"
4. Add to Classification Rules: "If blast-radius-score.py returns complex_override=true → force COMPLEX classification"
5. Document: blast-radius is a routing heuristic, not a comprehensive file list (per adversarial review)
6. Add optional blast_radius_score and blast_radius_signals fields to output schema

TDD: Task 8f5e-6c63 RED tests go GREEN.

### File Impact
- Edit: `plugins/dso/agents/complexity-evaluator.md`
- Edit: `.test-index` (remove RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Contains Blast Radius dimension
  Verify: grep -qi "blast.radius" plugins/dso/agents/complexity-evaluator.md
- [ ] References scoring script
  Verify: grep -q "blast-radius-score.py" plugins/dso/agents/complexity-evaluator.md
- [ ] COMPLEX forcing rule
  Verify: grep -qi "complex_override.*true.*COMPLEX\|blast.*radius.*force.*COMPLEX" plugins/dso/agents/complexity-evaluator.md
- [ ] Procedure step between Find Files and Apply Rubric
  Verify: python3 -c "t=open('plugins/dso/agents/complexity-evaluator.md').read(); fi=t.find('Find Files'); ar=t.find('Apply Rubric'); br=t.find('blast-radius-score.py'); assert fi < br < ar"
- [ ] Graceful degradation documented
  Verify: grep -qi "absent\|non-zero\|skip.*step" plugins/dso/agents/complexity-evaluator.md
- [ ] RED marker removed
  Verify: grep 'complexity-evaluator.md.*test_complexity_evaluator_agent.py' .test-index | grep -v '\['
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendments

### Update "5-dimension" references to "6-dimension"
The existing complexity-evaluator.md references "5-dimension rubric" in the frontmatter description and body headings. When adding Dimension 6, also update:
- Frontmatter description: "5-dimension rubric" → "6-dimension rubric"
- Body heading: "Five-Dimension Rubric" → "Six-Dimension Rubric" (or equivalent)
- Any other count references in the file

The existing test `test_complexity_evaluator_agent_body_five_dimension_rubric` checks for "Dimension" headings and 5 dimension terms. After adding blast_radius, update the existing test to also check for "Blast" or "blast_radius" in the dimension terms list.

### Update Classification Rules table
The Classification Rules table (promotion rules section) must include: "blast_radius complex_override = true → COMPLEX (always)". Without this, the classification rules are contradictory with Step 2.5's forcing instruction.

Additional AC:
- [ ] Classification Rules updated with blast-radius forcing
  Verify: grep -qi "blast.*radius\|complex_override" plugins/dso/agents/complexity-evaluator.md | head -1
- [ ] "5-dimension" references updated
  Verify: ! grep -qi "five.dimension\|5.dimension" plugins/dso/agents/complexity-evaluator.md
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done ✓ — All ACs verified: Blast Radius added as Dimension 6, Step 2.5 procedure with stdin pipe to blast-radius-score.py, graceful degradation, complex_override forcing rule in Classification Rules, Five→Six-Dimension updates, optional blast_radius_score/blast_radius_signals in output schema, RED marker removed from .test-index. Also fixed pre-existing tools: field missing from frontmatter. All 14 tests pass (14 passed in 0.02s).
